calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-051/MECH-304 conditioned safety store substrate readiness (curriculum-aware re-letter; supersedes V3-EXQ-519)
items.note: EXP-0067 (IGW-20260530-042). Substrate-aware re-letter: V3-EXQ-519 (2026-05-04) FAILed because the default env (limb_damage_enabled only) had no source of damage->heal trajectories MECH-302 could detect (relief_events=0 across all integration arms). Today (2026-05-30) the SD-022 scheduled-injection extension landed and V3-EXQ-517c PASSed validating MECH-302 AND lifting gate (c) for the V3-EXQ-519 retest. 519b adds the scheduled_limb_damage_* env curriculum kwargs across ALL integration arms (mirrors EXQ-517c verbatim: interval=50/prob=0.5/magnitude=0.4/limb_selection=random) AND calibrates suffering_window_length=30 + drop_threshold=0.005 + min_initial_norm=0.01 to match the curriculum heal-rate trajectory (the original 519 window=5 drop=0.08 was incompatible with the curriculum's 0.002/tick heal rate; calibration verified against 517c). Also disables unrelated death modes (num_hazards=0, contaminated_harm=0, damage_increment=0, failure_prob_scale=0) so the random-action harness survives the full 300-tick integration window -- the substrate-readiness diagnostic narrows to the (store, MECH-302) factors. Acceptance criteria C1-C9 unchanged from V3-EXQ-519. Smoke 2026-05-30T19:14Z all_pass=True (ARM_A peak_sig=0.982, 29 relief events accumulated; ARM_B/C/D bit-correct). PASS clears MECH-304 v3_pending gate.

items.title: SD-056 floor-recalibrated FP-2 falsifier (ARC-065 GAP-A / MECH-341); supersedes 569c
items.note: Floor-recalibrated successor to V3-EXQ-569c (FAIL on C1 borderline). C1 floor 0.05->0.03 per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-569c_2026-05-30 Section 5 (clean separation noise ~0.015 vs substrate-operative ~0.045). NaN bug on e3_top2_class_gap (NaN on ON arms in 569c due to non-finite scores leaking from contrastive-active E2) fixed via input non-finite filter in _per_class_score_stats + math.isfinite() check in caller; n_top2_gap_admitted + n_top2_gap_skipped_nonfinite surfaced per arm for verification. Extended P0 30->60 ep per user-confirmed budget (~220 min target). C3 tightened to strict-above matched-noise. Sister chip V3-EXQ-569e mechanism probe queued in parallel.

items.title: SD-056 mechanism probe (Pathway A vs Pathway B dissociation; parallel diagnostic to 569c/569d)
items.note: Parallel diagnostic to V3-EXQ-569d (floor-recalibrated falsifier). 569d tests 'is the substrate operative under the right floor'; 569e (this) tests 'where is the 569c C3 lift coming from'. Both reference REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-569c_2026-05-30.{md,json} as predecessor context. supersedes intentionally NOT set -- 569e is a parallel mechanism probe, NOT a falsifier successor. claim_ids=[ARC-065, MECH-341] preserved from 569c. experiment_purpose=diagnostic so the verdict cell informs governance application of the autopsy-recommended evidence_quality_note + per-claim direction shift on the 569c manifest but does NOT itself weight scoring. Measurement set M3 + M4 + M1 + M5 per user-confirmed design via AskUserQuestion 2026-05-30T17:00Z: M3 fixes the 569c e3_top2_class_gap NaN bug (filter at append + track skip count); M4 frozen-E2-at-P1 ablation arms (train E2 P0 only); M5 force-argmin ablation arms (P1 temperature=0.01); M1 rollout-divergence over full horizon. 8 arms x 5 seeds = 40 cells (TWO live weights 0.05 + 0.20 per user-confirmed design; 5 seeds rather than 569c's 3 per spawning prompt's discriminative-arithmetic budget). Pre-registered interpretation grid in script docstring maps (frozen_pres, argmin_pres, rollout_amp_ratio) -> PATHWAY_A / PATHWAY_B / BOTH / NEITHER / INSTRUMENTATION_FAILURE verdict cells with absolute thresholds (PRESERVED_FLOOR=0.5 / COLLAPSED_CEIL=0.2 / ROLLOUT_B_FLOOR=2.0). Dry-run smoke 2026-05-30T17:07Z: 8/8 arms run to completion; M4 frozen path + M5 argmin path both fire; M1 rollout metric computed without NaN; validate_experiments.py exit 0. Sister chip V3-EXQ-569d (priority 310; supersedes 569c) queued in parallel.
